# INTENT

## User Request

Add project statuses that are visible on the dashboard, plus disable and delete options. Delete should be available within the project and require confirmation before complete removal.

## Requested Outcome

Users can see project status in the dashboard, disable a project, and permanently delete a project from the project settings page with confirmation.

## Constraints

- Keep the scope focused on status visibility and project disable/delete behavior.
- Preserve the existing dashboard/project editing flow.
- Verification is required.

## Open Questions

- None for this slice.
